name: Colorectal Cancer (CRC)
description: A pheontype defining patients with strong evidence of having been diagnosed with colorectal cancer (cases) and patients who clearly do not have such diagnoses (controls).  This phenotype is being used for sequencing studies. The only NLP involved in this phenotype is a very simple string search applied to pathology reports.

downloaded_files.link_text: Un-validated ICD-10 codes relevant to CRC phenotype
Pseudo code updated 5/31/2017 to delete selected codes in Tables 5.1, 5.2.A, and 5.3.A (see tracked changes and table footnotes)
